title: Reinventing Public Relations Proficiencies With Artificial Intelligence
description: Dr Omoniyi Ibietan, Head, Media Relations Nigeria Communication Commission (NCC) / Faculty Member and Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director Financial Edge, at the 8th edition of the Lagos Digital
html: Dr Omoniyi Ibietan, Head, Media Relations Nigeria Communication Commission (NCC) / Faculty Member and Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director Financial Edge, at the 8th edition of the Lagos Digital PR Summit, with theme: “Reinventing Public Relations Proficiencies With Artificial Intelligence”, organized by the Nigerian Institute of Public Relations (NIPR), Lagos state chapter.
